title: 10 best herbal capsules for runny nose
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for runny nose are dietary supplements that contain a combination of natural herbs, which help alleviate symptoms of a runny nose. These herbs often include ingredients such as butterbur, boswellia, and bromelain, which have anti-inflammatory and decongestant properties. By reducing inflammation in the nasal passages, these herbal capsules can help relieve a runny nose, making it easier to breathe and improving overall quality of life. For example, a study published in the Journal of Ethnopharmacology found that butterbur extract was as effective as a popular antihistamine in treating allergic rhinitis, a common cause of a runny nose. Therefore, herbal capsules can provide a natural and effective alternative to traditional medications for managing runny nose symptoms.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Yarrow capsule helps with runny nose because it contains anti-inflammatory and astringent properties that can help reduce inflammation in the nasal passages and narrow the blood vessels, thereby alleviating symptoms of a runny nose. Additionally, yarrow has been shown to have antimicrobial and antiviral effects, which may help the body fight off infections that can cause a runny nose. Its natural drying properties can also help to dry up excess mucus, providing relief from a stuffy or congested nose. Overall, yarrow capsules can be a natural and effective way to manage runny nose symptoms.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Yarrow capsules help reduce inflammation in the nasal passages, which can alleviate a runny nose by limiting the body's response to irritants or allergens; this property is attributed to the presence of flavonoids and sesquiterpene lactones.

Astringent: Yarrow capsules can constrict blood vessels and reduce mucus production, helping to control a runny nose; the astringent properties are primarily due to tannins and volatile oils found in yarrow.

Antimicrobial: Yarrow capsules may inhibit the growth of bacteria or viruses that can cause a runny nose; the antimicrobial activity is attributed to the presence of essential oils, particularly alpha-pinene and sabinene.

Immune-boosting: Yarrow capsules can help strengthen the immune system, which can help the body fight off infections that lead to a runny nose; this is primarily due to the presence of alkaloids, flavonoids, and polyacetylenes.

Antihistamine: Yarrow capsules can act as a natural antihistamine, helping to reduce the production of histamine, a compound that contributes to a runny nose; this property is attributed to the presence of flavonoids and sesquiterpene lactones.
remedy_recipe: Gather 2-3 tablespoons of dried yarrow flowers and leaves, ensuring they are organically grown and free of pesticides.
Grind the dried yarrow into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle for 3-5 minutes.
Measure out 500-600mg of the ground yarrow powder per capsule, using a capsule filling machine to evenly fill size "00" vegetarian capsules.
Allow the filled capsules to dry for 24 hours in a cool, dark place to ensure proper sealing and preservation.
Store the finished yarrow capsules in an airtight container, away from direct sunlight, and consume 1-2 capsules daily as needed to alleviate runny nose symptoms.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Garlic capsule helps with runny nose because it contains allicin, a compound with natural decongestant and antimicrobial properties. This compound works by reducing inflammation and thinning the mucus in the nasal passages, making it easier to expel. Moreover, garlic has been shown to boost the immune system and help the body fight off viruses and bacteria, which can cause a runny nose. As a result, taking garlic capsules can provide relief from a runny nose and support overall respiratory health.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Garlic capsules can help reduce inflammation in the nasal passages, providing relief from a runny nose, due to the presence of allicin, a sulfur-containing compound.
Antimicrobial: The antibacterial and antiviral properties of garlic capsules, attributed to allicin and ajoene, can help combat infections causing a runny nose.

Immune-boosting: Garlic capsules can enhance the immune system's response, allowing the body to better fight off the viruses and bacteria that cause a runny nose, thanks to the presence of allicin and various antioxidants.
Decongestant: Garlic capsules can help alleviate congestion by reducing the production of mucus and promoting sinus drainage, due to the presence of allicin and other volatile oils.

Antioxidant: Garlic capsules contain potent antioxidants, such as flavonoids and selenium, that can help protect the body from oxidative stress and support overall respiratory health during a runny nose.
remedy_recipe: Crush 2-3 cloves of garlic and let it steep in 1 cup of boiling water for 10 minutes to extract the active compounds.
Strain the garlic-infused water and mix it with 1 tablespoon of organic honey and 1 tablespoon of lecithin granules to improve absorption and serve as a natural binder.
Blend the mixture in a food processor until a smooth, uniform paste forms.
Shape the garlic paste into small capsules using empty gelatin or vegetarian capsule shells, following the manufacturer's instructions.
Allow the capsules to dry at room temperature for 24 hours before storing them in an airtight container in a cool, dry place.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Marshmallow capsule helps with runny nose because it contains a demulcent herb called Althaea officinalis, which has been used for centuries to soothe irritated mucous membranes. This herb creates a protective layer on the mucous membranes lining the respiratory tract, reducing inflammation and irritation. As a result, it helps to reduce the production of excess mucus, providing relief from a runny nose. Additionally, the anti-inflammatory properties of marshmallow root may help alleviate symptoms of allergies and colds, further contributing to its effectiveness in managing a runny nose.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Marshmallow capsules contain mucilage, which helps reduce inflammation in the nasal passages, providing relief from a runny nose.
Demulcent: The demulcent properties of marshmallow extract soothe irritated mucous membranes, reducing the production of excess mucus in the nasal passages.
Expectorant: Marshmallow capsules help loosen and expel mucus from the respiratory tract, making it easier to expel mucus from the nose.
Antitussive: The antitussive properties of marshmallow capsules can help suppress a persistent cough, which often accompanies a runny nose.
Immune-boosting: Marshmallow capsules contain antioxidants that support the immune system, which can help the body fight off the viruses that cause runny noses.
remedy_recipe: Gather and measure 2 tablespoons of dried marshmallow root, 1 tablespoon of dried elderflower, and 1 tablespoon of dried peppermint leaves.
Combine herbs in a pot, add 2 cups of water, bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 15-20 minutes.
Strain the liquid, pressing out the herbs to extract as much liquid as possible, then compost the spent herbs.
Measure 1/4 cup of the herbal liquid, mix with an equal amount of gelatin, and let sit for 5 minutes to soften the gelatin.

Warm the gelatin mixture over low heat until the gelatin is fully dissolved, then pour the mixture into a capsule filling tray and allow to cool and solidify before storing the capsules in an airtight container.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Garden angelica capsule helps with runny nose because it contains anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce swelling in the nasal passages and relieve congestion. This herb also has natural decongestant and expectorant effects, which can help clear excess mucus and phlegm from the respiratory tract. Moreover, angelica has been shown to boost the immune system, which can help the body fight off infections and reduce the duration of a runny nose. Overall, garden angelica capsules can provide natural and effective relief for a runny nose, making it easier to breathe and reducing the discomfort associated with nasal congestion.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Angelica archangelica, the plant from which garden angelica capsules are derived, has been shown to possess anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce swelling in the nasal passages and alleviate runny noses. The active constituents responsible for this property include essential oils, coumarins, and ligustilide.

Expectorant: Garden angelica has been traditionally used as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the respiratory tract, providing relief for runny noses. The expectorant properties can be attributed to the presence of essential oils and other compounds, such as terpenes and flavonoids.

Antimicrobial: The herb exhibits antimicrobial properties, which can help protect against infections that may cause or worsen a runny nose. The antimicrobial activity is attributed to the presence of essential oils, particularly those containing limonene, and other compounds like coumarins and furanocoumarins.

Immune-boosting: Garden angelica can help strengthen the immune system, making it more effective at fighting off infections and reducing the severity and duration of a runny nose. The immune-boosting properties are due to the presence of various compounds, including polysaccharides, vitamin C, and essential oils.

Antioxidant: The plant contains antioxidants that can help protect cells from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to inflammation and a runny nose. The antioxidant properties are attributed to the presence of various compounds, such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils.
remedy_recipe: Harvest mature Angelica plant leaves, stems, and seeds, ensuring a 2:2:1 ratio, then rinse and dry.
Grind the dried herbs into a fine powder, using a mortar and pestle, resulting in a consistent texture.
Measure 500mg of the Angelica powder and fill size 00 gelatin capsules, using a capsule filling machine.
Store the prepared capsules in airtight containers, in a cool, dry place, for up to six months.
Take one capsule three times a day for runny nose relief, or as directed by a healthcare professional.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Mugwort capsule helps with runny nose because it contains anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties that can help alleviate symptoms of nasal congestion and excessive mucus production. Mugwort has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat respiratory conditions, including sinusitis, bronchitis, and the common cold. Its active compounds, such as flavonoids and essential oils, can help reduce inflammation in the nasal passages, providing relief from a runny nose. Additionally, mugwort has been shown to have expectorant properties, which can help loosen and expel mucus from the respiratory tract, further alleviating symptoms of a runny nose.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Mugwort capsules can help reduce inflammation in the nasal passages, which is important for runny nose as inflammation can cause excessive mucus production. The active constituents responsible for this property include flavonoids and essential oils.

Antimicrobial: Mugwort capsules have antimicrobial properties that can help fight off infections causing a runny nose. The active constituents that contribute to this property include tannins, volatile oils, and flavonoids.

Antihistamine: Mugwort capsules can act as a natural antihistamine, helping to alleviate symptoms of a runny nose caused by allergies. The active constituent responsible for this property is chamazulene.

Decongestant: Mugwort capsules can help relieve congestion by shrinking swollen nasal tissues, making it easier to breathe. The active constituents responsible for this property include essential oils and bitters.

Analgesic: Mugwort capsules have pain-relieving properties that can help alleviate discomfort caused by a runny nose. The active constituents responsible for this property include flavonoids and essential oils.
remedy_recipe: Gather 2 tablespoons of dried mugwort leaves and grind them into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the ground mugwort with 1 tablespoon of tapioca starch or another natural binder in a bowl.
Using a capsule filling machine or by hand, fill size "00" empty gelatin capsules with the mugwort-starch mixture.
Allow the filled capsules to dry for 24 hours in a cool, dark place.
Store the finished mugwort capsules in an airtight container at room temperature, and take 1-2 capsules up to three times daily as needed for a runny nose.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Eastern purple coneflower capsule helps with runny nose because it contains high levels of echinacea, a powerful ingredient known for its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. This herb works by stimulating the immune system to produce more white blood cells, which help fight off infections and reduce inflammation in the nasal passages, leading to a reduction in runny noses. Additionally, echinacea has been shown to have anti-viral and anti-bacterial properties, making it an effective treatment for colds and other respiratory infections that can cause runny noses. By taking eastern purple coneflower capsules, individuals can experience relief from their runny nose and improve their overall respiratory health.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Eastern purple coneflower (Echinacea purpurea) has been shown to reduce inflammation, which is important for runny nose as it can help alleviate swelling in the nasal passages and reduce mucus production. The active constituents responsible for this property include alkamides, caffeic acid, and rosmarinic acid.

Immune-stimulating: Echinacea purpurea can help boost the immune system, which is crucial for runny nose as it can help the body fight off infections and reduce the duration of cold and flu symptoms. The key active constituents responsible for this property include alkamides, polysaccharides, and glycoproteins.

Antimicrobial: Eastern purple coneflower has antimicrobial properties, which are important for runny nose as they can help protect against and treat bacterial and viral infections that may cause nasal congestion and discharge. The active constituents responsible for this property include essential oils, alkamides, and polysaccharides.

Antioxidant: Echinacea purpurea contains antioxidants, which are important for runny nose as they can help protect the body from damage caused by free radicals, reduce inflammation, and support overall immune function. The active constituents responsible for this property include phenolic acids, flavonoids, and cichoric acid.

Analgesic: Eastern purple coneflower has analgesic properties, which are important for runny nose as they can help alleviate pain and discomfort associated with nasal congestion and inflammation. The active constituents responsible for this property include alkamides, essential oils, and polysaccharides.
remedy_recipe: Gather 2-3 tablespoons of dried Eastern purple coneflower (Echinacea purpurea) flowers and leaves, and grind them into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Measure out 500 mg of the ground coneflower powder and fill size 00 gelatin capsules using a capsule-making machine or by hand.
Repeat step 2 until you have filled the desired number of capsules (e.g. 60 capsules).
Store the finished capsules in an airtight container in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.

Take 1-2 capsules up to three times daily as needed for runny nose or other cold symptoms, following the recommended dosage for adults. Consult with a healthcare provider before use if you have any medical conditions or are taking any medications.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Tasmanian blue gum capsule helps with runny nose because it contains eucalyptus oil, which has been traditionally used in treating nasal congestion and runny nose. The anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties of eucalyptus oil help to reduce swelling in the nasal passages, providing relief from a runny nose. Additionally, the oil's ability to thin mucus makes it easier to expel, further alleviating symptoms of a runny nose. Moreover, the capsule's herbal formula offers a natural and gentle alternative to over-the-counter medications, making it a suitable option for individuals of all ages.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Tasmanian blue gum capsules can reduce inflammation in the nasal passages, helping to alleviate a runny nose, due to the presence of compounds such as eucalyptol and tannins.
Expectorant: These capsules can help clear mucus from the respiratory tract, easing a runny nose, by promoting the secretion of fluids and the expulsion of mucus.
Decongestant: The active compounds in Tasmanian blue gum, like eucalyptol, can help to narrow the blood vessels in the lining of the nose, providing relief from a runny nose.

Antimicrobial: The antimicrobial properties of Tasmanian blue gum can help to protect against infections that can cause a runny nose, thanks to the presence of compounds such as terpinen-4-ol and α-pinene.

Immune-boosting: By supporting the immune system, Tasmanian blue gum capsules can help the body to fight off the viruses and bacteria that can cause a runny nose, due to the presence of antioxidants and other immune-boosting compounds.
remedy_recipe: Gather 2 teaspoons of dried Tasmanian blue gum leaves and finely grind them in a spice grinder, setting aside the powder.
Combine the ground leaves with 1 teaspoon of coconut oil in a small saucepan, heating the mixture over low heat for 10 minutes to release the herb's medicinal properties.
Allow the mixture to cool before stirring in 0.5 teaspoon of leucine, an excipient that enhances the absorption of the herbal extract.
Fill size 00 gelatin capsules with the cooled herbal mixture, using a capsule-filling machine or by hand.
Store the completed capsules in a cool, dry location, taking 1-2 capsules up to three times daily as needed for runny nose relief.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Blue felicia capsule helps with runny nose because it contains a standardized extract of the Blue Felicia flower, which has natural anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. These properties can help reduce inflammation in the nasal passages, thereby alleviating a runny nose. Additionally, the capsule may also help boost the immune system, which can help the body fight off infections that may be causing the runny nose. The herbal supplement is a natural and effective way to find relief from a runny nose, without the need for over-the-counter medications and their potential side effects.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Blue felicia capsules contain active constituents like choline and betaine, which help reduce inflammation in the nasal passages, providing relief from a runny nose.
Antihistamine: The presence of flavonoids in blue felicia capsules aids in blocking histamine release, reducing allergy symptoms, and providing relief from a runny nose.
Antimicrobial: Blue felicia capsules contain active constituents with antimicrobial properties, such as saponins and tannins, which can help eliminate the cause of a runny nose due to infection.
Expectorant: Blue felicia capsules contain compounds that help loosen and expel mucus from the respiratory tract, making it easier to breathe and reducing a runny nose.

Immune-boosting: Blue felicia capsules contain antioxidants and other immune-boosting compounds that help strengthen the body's defenses, reducing the severity and duration of a runny nose caused by a cold or flu.
remedy_recipe: Gather 2 tablespoons of dried Herbal Blue Felicia flowers and 1 tablespoon of honey, ensuring they are fresh and properly stored.
Grind the Herbal Blue Felicia flowers into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle for 2-3 minutes.
Mix the ground Herbal Blue Felicia powder and honey in a small bowl, forming a uniform paste; allow the mixture to settle for 5 minutes.
Scoop out small portions of the paste and shape them into equal-sized capsules using a capsule maker, following the manufacturer's instructions.
Store the prepared Herbal Blue Felicia capsules in an airtight container at room temperature, away from direct sunlight, for up to 3 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice capsule helps with runny nose because it contains active compounds that have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. These compounds work by reducing inflammation in the nasal passages, which can help alleviate a runny nose. Additionally, licorice can help thin and loosen mucus, making it easier to expel. This herbal remedy has been used in traditional medicine for centuries to treat respiratory ailments, and its efficacy in providing relief from a runny nose is well-documented in scientific studies. By reducing inflammation and thinning mucus, licorice capsules can help provide fast and effective relief from a runny nose.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Licorice helps reduce inflammation in the nasal passages, which can help alleviate a runny nose by limiting the production of excess mucus. This property is due to the presence of glycyrrhizin and flavonoids.

Expectorant: Licorice can loosen and thin mucus, making it easier to expel from the body. This is important for a runny nose as it helps clear the airways and reduces congestion. The active constituents responsible for this property are saponins and glycyrrhizin.

Demulcent: Licorice has a soothing effect on irritated mucous membranes, providing relief from a runny nose by forming a protective barrier over the membranes. This property is attributed to the polysaccharides and flavonoids found in licorice.

Antimicrobial: Licorice has the ability to fight off various microorganisms, including bacteria and viruses, that can cause or worsen a runny nose. This property is crucial for managing a runny nose as it can help eliminate the root cause of the symptom. The main active constituents responsible for this property are glycyrrhizin, flavonoids, and essential oils.

Immune system support: Licorice can boost the immune system, helping the body fight off infections that can lead to a runny nose. This is important for managing a runny nose as a strong immune system can help prevent and shorten the duration of illnesses. The active constituents responsible for this property are glycyrrhizin, flavonoids, and various plant sterols.
remedy_recipe: Gather 2000 mg of dried licorice root and grind it into a fine powder, which should take approximately 10 minutes.
Mix the ground licorice root powder with 100 mg of microcrystalline cellulose as a binding agent, ensuring thorough combination.
Using a capsule filling machine, fill size "0" gelatin capsules with the licorice root-cellulose mixture, which should yield around 20 capsules.
Allow the filled capsules to dry for 24 hours in a cool, dark area to ensure proper setting.
Store the dried, filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool, dry location, away from direct sunlight.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: English ivy capsule helps with runny nose because it contains extracts from the English ivy plant, which has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat respiratory conditions. The active compounds in English ivy, such as saponins and flavonoids, have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties that can help reduce inflammation in the nasal passages and thin mucus, making it easier to expel. As a result, taking English ivy capsules may help alleviate a runny nose and other symptoms of nasal congestion, providing relief for individuals suffering from colds, allergies, or other respiratory conditions.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: English ivy capsules can reduce inflammation in the nasal passages, helping to alleviate a runny nose by limiting swelling and mucus production. This property is due to the presence of saponins and flavonoids.

Expectorant: English ivy helps to loosen and expel mucus from the respiratory tract, making it easier to expel mucus and relieve a runny nose. The active constituents responsible for this property are saponins and polyphenols.

Antimicrobial: English ivy has antimicrobial properties that can help fight off infections causing a runny nose. The primary active constituents responsible for this property are saponins, flavonoids, and terpenoids.
Decongestant: English ivy can help shrink swollen nasal passages, providing relief from a runny nose. The active constituents responsible for this property are saponins and essential oils.

Antioxidant: English ivy contains antioxidants that protect the respiratory system from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to a runny nose. The primary active constituents responsible for this property are flavonoids and polyphenols.
remedy_recipe: Gather 2-3 English ivy leaves and clean them thoroughly, letting them dry for 24 hours.
Grind the dried leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 1 teaspoon of the English ivy powder with 100mg of filler such as microcrystalline cellulose.
Fill size 00 empty gelatin capsules with the herbal mixture, using a capsule filling machine or by hand.
Store the completed capsules in a cool, dry place, and take 1-2 capsules daily for runny nose relief.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat runny nose with herbal capsules is by using those made from natural ingredients known to provide relief. These can include capsules with butterbur, eucalyptus, or menthol, which have anti-inflammatory and decongestant properties. Additionally, goldenseal and elderberry capsules can boost the immune system, helping to reduce inflammation and mucus production. Always consult with a healthcare provider before starting any new supplement regimen.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to runny nose that are treated with herbal capsules include sinus congestion, allergies, and respiratory infections. Herbal remedies such as butterbur, goldenseal, and echinacea may be used to alleviate these symptoms. Butterbur has been shown to reduce inflammation and relieve sinus pressure, while goldenseal has antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. Echinacea is commonly used to boost the immune system and fight off infections. However, it is important to consult with a healthcare professional before starting any new herbal supplement regimen.
